title: Cherry — Were Not Rude Froze
content_html:
you were not rude. you froze.

then judged yourself like it was a choice

but your body moved first

next time does not need courage

it needs a smaller rep

save this for the next freeze

Cherry is for tiny social reps after the freeze. https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=site.cherryapp.cherry&hl=en_US

#socialanxiety #overthinking #anxietytools #confidencebuilding #mentalhealthapp

title: Cherry — Group Chat Moved On Without
content_html:
the group chat moved on without you

which almost felt like relief

until it felt like proof

that is the trap

send the smaller version sooner

save this before the next loop

Cherry helps you make social reps small enough to happen. https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=site.cherryapp.cherry&hl=en_US

#socialanxiety #overthinking #anxietytools #confidencebuilding #mentalhealthapp

title: Cherry — Brain Still Counted
content_html:
your brain still counted it

even if you called it nothing

even if nobody noticed

avoidance teaches too

teach one tiny entrance instead

save this before the next loop

Cherry helps you log what happened and pick one smaller social rep. https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=site.cherryapp.cherry&hl=en_US

#socialanxiety #overthinking #anxietytools #confidencebuilding #mentalhealthapp

title: Cherry — Waited Until Replying Weird
content_html:
you waited until replying was weird

then the delay became the problem

not the message

so next time

send the smaller reply first

save this for your next tiny rep

Small replies beat perfect replies. Cherry is on Google Play. https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=site.cherryapp.cherry&hl=en_US

#socialanxiety #overthinking #anxietytools #confidencebuilding #mentalhealthapp

title: Cherry — Text Got Heavier After Seen
content_html:
the text got heavier after “seen”

before that it was just a message

after that it became evidence

so you waited

and it got heavier

answer the smallest honest version

save this for your next tiny rep

The smallest honest reply is often the rep. Cherry is on Google Play. https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=site.cherryapp.cherry&hl=en_US

#socialanxiety #overthinking #anxietytools #confidencebuilding #mentalhealthapp

title: Cherry — Changed Aisles Avoid Saying Hi
content_html:
you changed aisles to avoid saying hi

then acted like you needed cereal

your brain called it safety

your body called it relief

but the rep was still there

just smaller next time

save this for your next tiny rep

Cherry is for the tiny social reps nobody else sees. https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=site.cherryapp.cherry&hl=en_US

#socialanxiety #overthinking #anxietytools #confidencebuilding #mentalhealthapp

title: Cherry — Confidence Wrong Starting Point
content_html:
confidence is the wrong starting point

confidence comes after evidence

evidence comes after reps

reps have to be tiny enough to do

start there

Do not wait to feel confident. Build tiny evidence first with Cherry. https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=site.cherryapp.cherry&hl=en_US

title: Cherry — Did Not Ignore Them Panicked
content_html:
you did not ignore them. you panicked quietly.

there was no plan

just a sudden blank

then the moment moved on without you

practice the smallest hello first

Cherry helps turn social moments into small reps instead of identity tests. https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=site.cherryapp.cherry&hl=en_US

#socialanxiety #overthinking #anxietytools #confidencebuilding #mentalhealthapp

title: Cherry — Call Rang Like Alarm
content_html:
the call rang like an alarm

it was only a phone call

your body did not care

so you watched it end

then felt ridiculous

start with the smaller version

Cherry helps you practice the smaller version before the big one. https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=site.cherryapp.cherry&hl=en_US

#socialanxiety #overthinking #anxietytools #confidencebuilding #mentalhealthapp

title: Cherry — Cancelling Plans Has Half-Life
content_html:
cancelling plans has a half-life

first relief

then quiet

then the next invite feels heavier

not a character flaw

just a rep your brain never got

save this before the next loop

Avoidance is relief with interest. Cherry helps you practice tiny social reps without needing confidence first. https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=site.cherryapp.cherry&hl=en_US

#socialanxiety #overthinking #anxietytools #confidencebuilding #mentalhealthapp

title: Cherry — Just Say Hi Skips Hard
content_html:
“just say hi” skips the hard part

the hard part is the second before

when your body votes no

so practice that moment

not the perfect version

Cherry helps with the tiny moment before the social move. https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=site.cherryapp.cherry&hl=en_US

#socialanxiety #overthinking #anxietytools #confidencebuilding #mentalhealthapp

title: Cherry — Rehearsed Hello Still Avoided Them
content_html:
you rehearsed hello and still avoided them

the script was not the problem

the first rep was too big

make the moment smaller

then practice that

Cherry is for shrinking social reps until they are doable. https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=site.cherryapp.cherry&hl=en_US

#socialanxiety #overthinking #anxietytools #confidencebuilding #mentalhealthapp
